Title: xCMS — pages Happy Path
Preconditions: Runner-native. Lists xCMS pages for the store with full field selection (id, name, relativeUrl, permalink). PUBLIC role — no [AUTH] required.
Assertions:
[ERRORS label=list_pages] errors[] empty
[DATA label=list_pages] data.pages is non-null
[COUNT label=list_pages] data.pages.totalCount >= 0
Failure_Signals: pages query null; items missing id/name/relativeUrl; HTTP 500

Title: xCMS — page Detail by ID (Captured)
Preconditions: Runner-native. Lists pages, captures items[0].id, then resolves single page by id. Verifies the round-trip pages → page(id) is consistent.
Steps:
[GQL-OP list_pages]
  query { pages(storeId: "{{STORE_ID}}" keyword: "" first: 1 cultureName: "en-US") { items { id name } } }
[GQL-EXEC list_pages]
[GQL-CAPTURE list_pages.data.pages.items.0.id → PAGE_ID]
[GQL-OP one_page]
  query { page(storeId: "{{STORE_ID}}" id: "{{PAGE_ID}}" cultureName: "en-US") { id name relativeUrl permalink content } }
[GQL-EXEC one_page]
Assertions:
[ERRORS label=one_page] errors[] empty
[DATA label=one_page] data.page is non-null
[DATA label=one_page] data.page.id = {{PAGE_ID}}
[DATA label=one_page] data.page.name is non-null
Failure_Signals: page returns null for valid id; id mismatch with captured PAGE_ID; HTTP 500

Title: xCMS — page Non-Existent ID Returns Null
Preconditions: Runner-native. page query with zero-GUID id — expects graceful null or graceful error, never HTTP 500.
Assertions: [DATA label=page_bogus] data is non-null or errors[] is non-empty
Failure_Signals: HTTP 500; crash; stack trace in errors[]

Title: xCMS — pages Cursor Pagination
Preconditions: Runner-native. Requests first=2, captures endCursor, then first=2 after=cursor. Verifies pageInfo cursor advancement.
Steps:
[GQL-OP page1]
  query { pages(storeId: "{{STORE_ID}}" keyword: "" first: 2) { totalCount pageInfo { hasNextPage endCursor } items { id } } }
[GQL-EXEC page1]
[GQL-CAPTURE page1.data.pages.pageInfo.endCursor → CURSOR]
[GQL-OP page2]
  query { pages(storeId: "{{STORE_ID}}" keyword: "" first: 2 after: "{{CURSOR}}") { pageInfo { hasPreviousPage } items { id } } }
[GQL-EXEC page2]
Assertions:
[ERRORS label=page1] errors[] empty
[ERRORS label=page2] errors[] empty
[DATA label=page1] data.pages.pageInfo is non-null
[DATA label=page2] data.pages is non-null
Failure_Signals: Cursor pagination broken; same items returned on both pages; pageInfo missing endCursor

Title: xCMS — pages with cultureName Localization
Preconditions: Runner-native. Passes cultureName="de-DE" — expects errors empty even if no localized content exists (graceful fallback).
Assertions:
[ERRORS label=de_pages] errors[] empty
[DATA label=de_pages] data.pages is non-null

Title: xCMS — pages Keyword No-Match Returns Empty
Preconditions: Runner-native. pages with a deliberately-unique keyword that should not match — expects totalCount=0 and items=[] without HTTP 500.
Assertions:
[ERRORS label=no_match] errors[] empty
[DATA label=no_match] data.pages is non-null
[COUNT label=no_match] data.pages.totalCount >= 0
Failure_Signals: HTTP 500 on no-match probe; arbitrary results returned

Title: xCMS — menus List
Preconditions: Runner-native. Lists menus for the store. Returns list of MenuLinkListType (not a Connection — no totalCount).
Assertions:
[ERRORS label=list_menus] errors[] empty
[DATA label=list_menus] data.menus is non-null
Failure_Signals: menus query null; items missing title/url; HTTP 500

Title: xCMS — menu by Name (Captured)
Preconditions: Runner-native. Lists menus, captures menus[0].name, then resolves single menu by name. Verifies menus → menu(name) round-trip.
Steps:
[GQL-OP list_menus]
  query { menus(storeId: "{{STORE_ID}}" cultureName: "en-US") { name } }
[GQL-EXEC list_menus]
[GQL-CAPTURE list_menus.data.menus.0.name → MENU_NAME]
[GQL-OP one_menu]
  query { menu(storeId: "{{STORE_ID}}" cultureName: "en-US" name: "{{MENU_NAME}}") { name outerId items { title url } } }
[GQL-EXEC one_menu]
Failure_Signals: menu returns null for known name; name mismatch with captured MENU_NAME

Title: xCMS — menu Non-Existent Name Returns Null
Preconditions: Runner-native. menu query with deliberately-unique name — expects graceful null or graceful error, never HTTP 500.
Assertions: [DATA label=menu_bogus] data is non-null or errors[] is non-empty
Failure_Signals: HTTP 500; crash; stack trace in errors[]

Title: xCMS — pageContext Homepage with userId
Preconditions: Runner-native. pageContext for the storefront homepage (permalink="/") with env-supplied domain + userId hint. Returns nested store + slugInfo + whiteLabelingSettings + user. Required env vars: STOREFRONT_DOMAIN (host portion of FRONT_URL), TEST_USER_ID (real user GUID on this env). Note: when called anonymously (no Bearer token), pageContext.user returns a fresh session-anonymous user GUID per request — the userId arg is a session hint to the resolver, NOT an authoritative ID echoed back. Assertions therefore check structural invariants (non-null, valid GUID, slugInfo.entityInfo.objectType=ContentFile for homepage) rather than user-id equality.
Assertions:
[ERRORS label=ctx_home] errors[] empty
[DATA label=ctx_home] data.pageContext is non-null
[DATA label=ctx_home] data.pageContext.store.storeId is non-null
[DATA label=ctx_home] data.pageContext.slugInfo.entityInfo.objectType = ContentFile
[DATA label=ctx_home] data.pageContext.user.id is non-empty GUID
Failure_Signals: pageContext throws; HTTP 500; store.storeId null on valid storeId; slugInfo.entityInfo.objectType ≠ ContentFile (home no longer maps to ContentFile-style page); user.id missing/non-GUID; whiteLabelingSettings inaccessible

Title: xCMS — pageDocuments List
Preconditions: Runner-native. Lists page documents for the store. Empty result acceptable (totalCount=0 if no documents seeded in QA).
Assertions:
[ERRORS label=list_docs] errors[] empty
[DATA label=list_docs] data.pageDocuments is non-null
[COUNT label=list_docs] data.pageDocuments.totalCount >= 0

Title: xCMS — pageDocument Zero-GUID Returns Null
Preconditions: Runner-native. pageDocument query with zero-GUID id — expects graceful null or graceful error, never HTTP 500.
Assertions: [DATA label=doc_bogus] data is non-null or errors[] is non-empty
Failure_Signals: HTTP 500; crash; stack trace in errors[]

Title: xCMS — pageContext Catalog Page with userId
Preconditions: Runner-native. pageContext for the storefront catalog page (permalink="/catalog") with env-supplied domain + userId hint. Companion to GQL-123 (homepage). Verifies slugInfo resolves the /catalog permalink to a Catalog entity (semanticUrl="catalog") — the meaningful behavioral difference from the homepage. user resolver populates an anonymous session GUID (see GQL-123 note re: userId arg semantics). Required env vars: STOREFRONT_DOMAIN, TEST_USER_ID.
Assertions:
[ERRORS label=ctx_catalog] errors[] empty
[DATA label=ctx_catalog] data.pageContext is non-null
[DATA label=ctx_catalog] data.pageContext.store.storeId is non-null
[DATA label=ctx_catalog] data.pageContext.slugInfo.entityInfo.objectType = Catalog
[DATA label=ctx_catalog] data.pageContext.slugInfo.entityInfo.semanticUrl = catalog
[DATA label=ctx_catalog] data.pageContext.user.id is non-empty GUID
Failure_Signals: pageContext throws on /catalog permalink; slugInfo.entityInfo.objectType ≠ Catalog (catalog permalink no longer resolves to Catalog entity); semanticUrl ≠ catalog; user.id missing/non-GUID; HTTP 500
